title: Russia blames Ukrainian naval drones as tanker sinks in Mediterranean
summary_full: The Arctic Metagaz went down between Libya and Malta after it was hit by explosions and a fire, Libyan officials say.
summary_public: The Arctic Metagaz went down between Libya and Malta after it was hit by explosions and a fire, Libyan officials say.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia blames Ukrainian naval drones as tanker sinks
